title: Rooted in Silence
premise: A survey team's rover crashes on an uncharted exoplanet, stranding them in a valley of hyper-reactive flora. As they attempt a desperate trek to high ground for extraction, they realize the ecosystem operates on a shared neural network, turning every step into a trigger for predatory ambushes by plant and beast alike.

characters.name: Commander Elias Vane
characters.description: A career officer in his early 40s, Vane carries the weight of a previous mission where half his squad was lost to a navigational error he authorized. Pragmatic to a fault, he suppresses grief behind rigid protocol and checklists. His sole metric for success is the survival of the three people currently under his command. He moves with the economy of motion of a man who knows hesitation kills, constantly scanning the treeline for threats while calculating oxygen reserves and distance to the extraction ridge.
characters.looks: A 42-year-old man, weathered olive skin with deep lines etched around the eyes and mouth, close-cropped salt-and-pepper hair receding slightly at the temples, steel-grey eyes narrowed against the alien sunlight looking at a datapad in his hand, strong jawline shadowed by two days of dark stubble, wearing a scorched and dust-caked charcoal tactical EVA suit with reinforced knee pads and a magnetic holster at the hip, a torn mission patch on the right shoulder, utility belt heavy with canisters and tools, gloves frayed at the fingertips, standing in a wide stable stance on uneven volcanic rock

characters.name: Dr. Aris Thorne
characters.description: Brilliant but distractible, Thorne views the lethal valley not as a death trap but as a once-in-a-millennium data set. His academic detachment is a coping mechanism; by categorizing the horror, he controls his fear. He notices the subtle bioluminescent pulse timing in the flora and the harmonic resonance in the fauna's calls—patterns the military mind misses. He carries a custom-modified multispectral scanner jury-rigged from the rover's wreckage, treating his own safety as a secondary variable in the equation of discovery.
characters.looks: A 34-year-old man, pale cool-toned skin flushed from exertion and altitude, messy chestnut-brown hair falling over his forehead in a sweat-dampened fringe, warm hazel eyes wide with intense focus looking down at a glowing handheld scanner, thin wire-rimmed glasses slipping down a straight nose, wearing a once-white environmental undersuit now stained ochre and green by alien pollen, sleeves rolled up revealing forearm tattoos of taxonomic trees, a bulky ruggedized backpack stuffed with sample vials and sensor nodules, fingerless tactical gloves allowing dexterity for touchscreens, crouched low examining a pulsating fungal frond

characters.name: Sergeant Kaelen 'Kae' Vance
characters.description: The team's anchor, Kae is running on a cocktail of combat stims, synthetic adrenaline, and sheer stubbornness after a bulkhead crushed her left leg during the crash landing. She refuses evacuation, knowing her weight slows them down but her firepower keeps them alive. Cynical humor masks a fierce, almost maternal protectiveness toward the crew. She pilots the comms drone remotely with one hand while laying down suppressing fire with the other, her neural interface flickering at her temple. She knows the extraction window is a fantasy, but she'll die making it real for the others.
characters.looks: A 38-year-old woman, rich dark brown skin glistening with sweat, tight cornrows pulled back severely from a high forehead, piercing dark brown eyes tracking movement in the upper canopy scanning for aerial threats, a jagged white scar bisecting her left eyebrow, wearing a matte-black heavy assault exoskeleton frame over a compression flightsuit, the left leg brace locked rigid with hydraulic assists whining softly, a modular railgun resting against her shoulder connected to an ammo drum on her back, fingerless gloves showing knuckle tattoos reading 'AD ASTRA', a cracked pilot's wing pin pinned near her collar, leaning heavily on a carbon-fiber crutch planted in the dirt

characters.name: The Whisperer (Alien Fauna)
characters.description: An apex predator evolved not for speed or strength, but for informational warfare. It lacks eyes, navigating via electroreception and the planet's mycelial 'internet.' Its skin is a dynamic chromatophore matrix allowing perfect visual and thermal mimicry of surroundings—rock, flora, even the shimmer of heat haze. It hunts by injecting false data into the neural net: mimicking a crewmate's distress call, replicating the seismic signature of safe footing, or silencing its own bio-electric field to become a 'hole' in the world's perception. It doesn't chase; it arranges the environment to deliver prey to its waiting maw.
characters.looks: A towering 3-meter-tall quadrupedal entity, skin a shifting oil-slick of iridescent chromatophores currently mimicking the grey-green lichen on the valley walls making its outline nearly invisible, smooth featureless head tapering to a prehensile proboscis instead of a jaw, no eyes only clusters of electroreceptive ampullae glittering like wet obsidian along the snout, six multi-jointed limbs ending in gecko-setae pads gripping the vertical cliff face silently, bioluminescent veins pulsing dimly along its flanks in sync with the surrounding fungal network, a low-frequency harmonic vibration distorting the air around it, perched motionless on a rocky overhang looking down at the trail below where the team walks

scenes.setting: Crash site on an uncharted exoplanet valley floor at twilight. The wreckage of a survey rover smolders in soft, yielding soil. Strange purple ferns sway rhythmically without wind. Two massive alien moons rise on the horizon, casting pale, cold light across the surreal landscape.
scenes.description: A wide establishing shot reveals the aftermath of the crash. The rover hull groans and settles deeper into the ground. No survivors are visible yet. The alien environment reacts to the intrusion with eerie, synchronized plant movement under the rising moons. - Verified!
scenes.script: [Narrator]: Twilight descends on the silent wreckage. - Test Update
scenes.imagePrompt: Cinematic wide establishing shot, low angle perspective capturing the vastness of the alien valley floor at twilight. Center frame: a massive, scorched survey rover hull half-sunk into soft, dark volcanic soil, thin trails of white smoke curling from ruptured panels, metal groaning under its own weight. Foreground: dense fields of bizarre purple ferns with translucent, bioluminescent veins pulsing in slow, synchronized waves, swaying in perfect unison despite zero atmospheric wind. Background: jagged basalt cliffs framing the scene, two enormous alien moons rising in conjunction on the horizon - one pale blue, one rust-red - casting dual shadows and painting the scene in ethereal, cold moonlight. Atmospheric volumetric lighting, dust motes dancing in the light beams. Hyper-realistic, photorealistic, 8k resolution, Unreal Engine 5 render style, cinematic color grading, detailed textures on metal and flora, sense of oppressive silence and imminent danger.

scenes.setting: Inside the crashed rover cockpit, illuminated by flashing red emergency lights. The cracked viewport is pressed against by dense purple alien ferns.
scenes.description: Extreme close-up on Commander Vane's hand gripping the console, knuckles white, as he exhales a sharp breath that fogs the freezing air. don't use slow motion, movement should be fast like a reaslistic world
scenes.script: [Narrator]: Vane grips console, breath fogging cold air.
scenes.imagePrompt: Extreme close-up macro shot, realistic photography style, cinematic lighting, photorealistic, 8k resolution. Focus on Commander Elias Vane's gloved hand gripping a rover console, knuckles white with tension, frayed fingertips of scorched and dust-caked charcoal tactical EVA suit sleeve visible. Harsh flashing red emergency lights casting crimson reflections on the glove and cracked viewport glass. Background blurred but discernible: purple alien ferns pressing against the fractured transparisteel windshield. Lower frame reveals Vane's weathered olive skin jawline shadowed by dark stubble, exhaling a sharp plume of condensation fogging the freezing air. Vane's steel-grey eyes are directed downward at the console readouts, not at the camera. High detail textures of volcanic dust, suit fabric weave, and moisture beads. Shallow depth of field.

scenes.setting: Rover aft compartment, dim emergency lighting, cramped bulkhead walls with exposed wiring and crash debris
scenes.description: Kae administers a combat stim while eyeing the ceiling hatch, suppressing pain from her crushed leg.
scenes.script: Stim injected. Eyes hatch. Silent wince.
scenes.imagePrompt: Medium shot, realistic photography style, cinematic lighting, photorealistic, 8k. Inside a cramped rover aft compartment, dim red and blue emergency lights casting long shadows on scorched bulkheads. Sergeant Kaelen 'Kae' Vance, 38-year-old woman, rich dark brown skin glistening with sweat, tight cornrows pulled back severely, piercing dark brown eyes looking upward toward a ceiling hatch (not at camera), jagged white scar bisecting left eyebrow. She sits propped against a bulkhead, wearing a matte-black heavy assault exoskeleton frame over a compression flightsuit, left leg brace locked rigid with hydraulic assists, a makeshift tourniquet wrapped tight above the knee. Her right hand presses a glowing blue stim-pack injector against her neck, jaw clenched in a silent wince, fingerless gloves showing 'AD ASTRA' knuckle tattoos. A modular railgun rests against the wall within reach, a cracked pilot's wing pin on her collar. Volumetric dust motes dance in the harsh light beams, shallow depth of field focusing on her face and the injector.

scenes.setting: Inside the crashed rover's science station, dimly lit by flickering holographic topographical maps and erratic scrolling sensor data on a handheld pad, the air thick with dust and the hum of damaged life support.
scenes.description: Dr. Thorne analyzes erratic sensor readings on a datapad, suddenly freezing as he realizes the valley's flora operates as a unified neural network.
scenes.script: [Narrator]: Thorne realizes the valley is a single organism.
scenes.imagePrompt: Extreme close-up macro shot, shallow depth of field, focusing on Dr. Aris Thorne's face and hands: a 34-year-old man with pale cool-toned skin flushed from exertion, messy chestnut-brown hair damp with sweat falling over his forehead, warm hazel eyes wide with sudden terrifying realization, pupils dilated, thin wire-rimmed glasses slipping down his nose, fingerless tactical gloves hovering over a glowing handheld scanner displaying chaotic scrolling biometric data. He is frozen mid-tap, lips parted in a silent whisper. The only light source is the cool cyan flicker of the holographic maps and the scanner screen casting sharp shadows across his cheekbones and the taxonomic tree tattoos on his forearms visible under rolled-up sleeves of his stained ochre-and-green environmental undersuit. Background is a soft bokeh of the rover's damaged interior. Cinematic low-key lighting, volumetric dust motes dancing in the holographic glow, photorealistic, 8k resolution, highly detailed skin texture, realistic photography style.

scenes.description: The team prepares to exit the crashed rover; Vane orders departure, Thorne secures samples, Kae readies her weapon.

scenes.setting: Exterior - Rover crash site, alien valley floor. The ramp of the downed survey rover lowers into a thick atmosphere swirling with bioluminescent spores drifting like radioactive snow. Volcanic rock terrain glows with faint subsurface pulses.
scenes.description: The crew descends the rover ramp onto the alien surface. A low-angle perspective captures the first boots striking the soil, triggering a visible pulse in the ground and the instant defensive retraction of a nearby giant fern.
scenes.script: Boots hit soil; ground pulses, fern retracts.
scenes.imagePrompt: Extreme low-angle worm's-eye view shot looking up the interior of the rover's lowered ramp, realistic photography style, cinematic lighting, photorealistic, 8k resolution. Commander Elias Vane's boots (charcoal tactical EVA suit, reinforced knee pads, dust-caked) make first contact with the dark volcanic alien soil, kicking up a cloud of glowing bioluminescent spores drifting like snow in volumetric alien sunlight. The ground beneath his boots emits a faint, rapid bioluminescent pulse radiating outward through subsurface fungal networks. In the immediate foreground, a massive alien fern with iridescent fronds snaps shut violently, retracting into a protective armored sheath at the vibration. Behind Vane, Dr. Aris Thorne (pale skin, messy chestnut hair, hazel eyes fixed on glowing handheld scanner, ochre-stained undersuit, taxonomic forearm tattoos, bulky ruggedized backpack) descends cautiously. Sergeant Kaelen Vance (dark brown skin, cornrows, dark brown eyes scanning upper canopy, matte-black heavy assault exoskeleton, locked hydraulic left leg brace, modular railgun, carbon-fiber crutch) follows, leaning heavily. No character looks at the camera. High contrast between harsh alien sunlight and deep shadows, detailed texture on suit fabric and alien flora, atmospheric haze thick with glowing particulates.

scenes.setting: Valley floor of an uncharted exoplanet, uneven volcanic rock interspersed with thick, bioluminescent moss and pulsating fungal growths under a harsh alien sun.
scenes.description: The team moves in a tight triangle formation; Kae's boot sinks into reactive moss which emits a loud hissing gas cloud, alerting the neural network.
scenes.script: [Narrator]: Kae's boot sinks; moss hisses warning.

scenes.description: Extreme close-up reveals moss instantly shifting from calm blue to aggressive red as microscopic barbed tendrils erupt upward with surgical speed toward Kae's armored ankle.

scenes.description: Kae tears her trapped foot free, ripping her suit, and falls backward into Thorne. He catches her, both staring down as red veins race through the ground beneath them.
scenes.script: Thorne catches Kae. Red veins pulse underground.

scenes.description: The team picks their way through the column forest. Thorne scans a hanging sac; it violently recoils from his scanner's beam.
scenes.script: [Dr. Aris Thorne]: It reacted to the light.

scenes.setting: Alien forest floor, dense with bioluminescent flora and volcanic rock, harsh sunlight piercing the canopy
scenes.description: Vane shouts a warning as Thorne tackles Kae sideways; the Whisperer launches from above, striking the empty space Thorne just occupied.
scenes.script: Vane yells 'Kae down!' Thorne tackles her. Beast misses.

Dr. Aris Thorne (34, pale skin, messy chestnut hair, hazel eyes, wire-rim glasses, stained white undersuit, bulky backpack) mid-air horizontal tackle, fingerless gloves gripping Sergeant Kaelen Vance. Sergeant Kae Vance (38, dark brown skin, tight cornrows, scarred eyebrow, matte-black assault exoskeleton, locked left leg brace, railgun slung, carbon-fiber crutch falling away) knocked sideways off balance, dark eyes wide with surprise, looking at Thorne. The Whisperer (3-meter quadruped, iridescent chromatophore skin mimicking grey-green lichen, featureless head with electroreceptive ampullae, six multi-jointed limbs with gecko-setae pads, bioluminescent veins pulsing) launching downward from a rocky overhang above, massive blurred form distorting air with harmonic vibration, impacting the exact spot Thorne vacated milliseconds prior, alien forest floor debris exploding upward. scenes.setting: Airborne beneath a towering basalt column in the valley, the air thick with bioluminescent spores and the hum of the planetary neural network.
scenes.description: The Whisperer misses Thorne, lands on a column, and flashes a blinding strobe pattern from its chromatophore skin. The intense light triggers all hanging caustic sacs on the column to burst simultaneously, raining corrosive fluid downward.
scenes.script: Strobe flashes. Sacs burst. Acid rains down.
scenes.imagePrompt: Extreme low-angle shot looking straight up the sheer face of a towering basalt column. The Whisperer, a towering 3-meter quadrupedal entity with iridescent oil-slick chromatophore skin currently flashing a blinding, high-frequency strobe pattern of intense white and ultraviolet light, perches atop the column via six multi-jointed gecko-setae limbs. Its featureless head tapers to a prehensile proboscis; clusters of electroreceptive ampullae glitter like wet obsidian. The strobe illuminates dozens of translucent, pulsating organic sacs clustered beneath a rocky overhang on the column side. All sacs rupture simultaneously in a synchronized explosion, spraying a violent torrent of viscous, sizzling yellow-green caustic fluid directly toward the camera lens. Dr. Aris Thorne, pale skin flushed, messy chestnut hair, wire-rim glasses, ochre-stained undersuit, bulky ruggedized backpack, is visible in the lower foreground mid-dodge, hazel eyes wide with terror, throwing an arm up to shield his face from the deluge. Cinematic volumetric lighting, high-speed photography freeze-frame of fluid dynamics, photorealistic 8k, unreal engine 5 render style, intense dynamic contrast between blinding strobe and dark rock.

scenes.setting: Narrow crevice entrance on a volcanic ridge wall, dense alien forest floor, heavy acid rain hissing on impact
scenes.description: Vane shoves Thorne into the crevice, Kae hobbles in on crutch, Vane fires plasma pistol behind them melting rock to seal the entrance.
scenes.script: Vane shoves Thorne in. Kae hobbles. Entrance seals.

Harsh alien daylight filtered through toxic clouds, high contrast, visceral texture detail, no characters looking at camera.

scenes.setting: A tight, vertical crevice in volcanic rock, dimly lit by faint bioluminescent moss and the blue glow of suit HUDs. Walls press close, forcing the team into a cramped, standing rest. The air is thick with dust and the sound of labored breathing and rhythmic low-oxygen alarms.
scenes.description: The team pauses in a narrow rock fissure. Commander Vane checks his wrist display showing critically low oxygen. Dr. Thorne monitors a scanner revealing the valley's neural network flaring into a predatory high-alert state.
scenes.script: Vane: Twelve percent oxygen. Thorne: The network is hunting us.
scenes.imagePrompt: Realistic photography style, cinematic lighting, photorealistic, claustrophobic medium shot inside a narrow vertical rock crevice. Foreground left: Commander Elias Vane, 42, weathered olive skin, deep lines, salt-and-pepper close-cropped hair, steel-grey eyes, dark stubble, wearing scorched charcoal tactical EVA suit with reinforced knees, magnetic holster, torn mission patch, utility belt, frayed gloves; he raises his left wrist to eye level, staring intently at a glowing holographic display on his gauntlet reading '12% O2' in stark red numbers. Center right: Dr. Aris Thorne, 34, pale cool-toned skin flushed, messy sweat-dampened chestnut fringe, warm hazel eyes wide behind slipping wire-rim glasses, stained ochre-green environmental undersuit, sleeves rolled showing taxonomic forearm tattoos, fingerless gloves; he crouches slightly, holding a custom multispectral scanner projecting a 3D holographic map of the valley glowing intense crimson red, his face illuminated by the bloody light. Background shadows: Sergeant Kaelen 'Kae' Vance, 38, rich dark brown skin glistening, tight cornrows, piercing dark brown eyes scanning the crevice exit, jagged scar bisecting left eyebrow, matte-black heavy assault exoskeleton over compression flightsuit, locked hydraulic left leg brace, modular railgun resting on shoulder, 'AD ASTRA' knuckle tattoos, cracked pilot wing pin; she leans heavily on a carbon-fiber crutch, chest heaving, looking away toward the darkness ahead. Dim bioluminescent moss on jagged rock walls provides faint blue-green rim lighting. Low-angle perspective looking up slightly, shallow depth of field focusing on Vane's wrist and Thorne's scanner. High detail, 8k resolution, raw style.
